allow: PowerShell(python -c "import json; from src.solver import solve_impulse_circuit; from src.standards import evaluate_lightning_impulse; cfg=json.load\(open\('config.json'\)\); t,v1,v2=solve_impulse_circuit\(cfg\); print\('V_C1[0]=', v1[0], 'kV   V_C2[0]=', v2[0], 'kV'\); print\('peak V_C2 =', v2.max\(\), 'kV at t=', t[v2.argmax\(\)], 'us'\); print\(evaluate_lightning_impulse\(t, v2\)\)")
PowerShell(python main.py; if \(Test-Path impulse_plot.png\) { $f = Get-Item impulse_plot.png; "Plot file: $\($f.Length\) bytes, modified $\($f.LastWriteTime\)" } else { "NO PLOT WRITTEN" })

PowerShell(python -c "import PyQt6; print\('PyQt6', PyQt6.QtCore.PYQT_VERSION_STR if hasattr\(PyQt6, 'QtCore'\) else 'present'\); from PyQt6.QtCore import QT_VERSION_STR; print\('Qt', QT_VERSION_STR\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(python -c "import json, copy; from src.solver import find_optimal_resistors, solve_impulse_circuit; from src.standards import evaluate_lightning_impulse; cfg=json.load\(open\('config.json'\)\); orig=copy.deepcopy\(cfg\); print\('Before:'\); t,_,v2=solve_impulse_circuit\(cfg\); ev=evaluate_lightning_impulse\(t,v2\); print\(f'  R1={cfg[\\"impulse_generator\\"][\\"R1_ohm\\"]:.1f}  R2={cfg[\\"impulse_generator\\"][\\"R2_ohm\\"]:.1f}  T1={ev[\\"T1_us\\"]:.3f}  T2={ev[\\"T2_us\\"]:.2f}  std={ev[\\"is_standard_lightning\\"]}'\); opt=find_optimal_resistors\(cfg\); print\(f'Optimized: R1={opt[\\"R1_ohm\\"]:.2f}  R2={opt[\\"R2_ohm\\"]:.2f}'\); cfg2=copy.deepcopy\(cfg\); cfg2['impulse_generator'].update\(opt\); t,_,v2=solve_impulse_circuit\(cfg2\); ev=evaluate_lightning_impulse\(t,v2\); print\(f'  After: T1={ev[\\"T1_us\\"]:.3f}  T2={ev[\\"T2_us\\"]:.2f}  std={ev[\\"is_standard_lightning\\"]}'\); print\(f'Input config untouched: {cfg == orig}'\)")

Bash(python -c "from src.solver import find_optimal_resistors; print\('RLC keys:', list\(find_optimal_resistors\({'V0_kV':100,'C1_nF':100,'C2_nF':1,'R1_ohm':500,'R2_ohm':2500,'L_uH':10,'circuit_mode':'RLC'}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('Cur keys:', list\(find_optimal_resistors\({'V0_kV':100,'C1_nF':100,'C2_nF':1,'R1_ohm':500,'R2_ohm':2500,'L_uH':10,'circuit_mode':'Impulse Current'}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
